title: pharmacum glabrum
intro: Pharmacum glabrum, also known as smooth Pharmacum, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is primarily found in the mountainous regions of North America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Pharmacum glabrum include its ability to treat skin conditions, such as eczema and acne, as well as its use as a wound healer due to its antiseptic properties. Herbal preparations of Pharmacum glabrum can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves, which are often used to promote wound healing and soothe skin irritations.
